title: melissitus pubescens
intro: Melissitus pubescens, also known as the yellow horned poppy, is a plant species in the family Papaveraceae, characterized by its yellow flowers and distinctive horn-like growths on its seed pods. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Melissitus pubescens include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and salves, which can be used topically to apply its medicinal properties directly to the skin.
